message:
fix(tui): add cleanup() to release configCloser on dashboard quit

The config watcher goroutine was leaking because configCloser was
assigned but never called. Added cleanup() method that releases
the config watcher, and call it before every tea.Quit return:
- exitPopupOverlay()
- handlePaneZoomWithCursor()
- keyboard Quit handler

This prevents goroutine leaks when the dashboard exits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
